title: inclusio-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the Inclusio accessibility-first LaTeX publishing engine. Exposes tools for tagged-PDF generation (PDF/UA-2 + WTPDF + PDF/A-4f triple-conformance), multi-format emission (HTML5 / JATS / EPUB3), C2PA + PAdES + SLSA provenance, LLM-augmented accessibility judges (ATS, citations, JD-fit). Requires `pip install 'inclusio[mcp]'`.
